pending.description: New agent: Knox — Knowledge Manager. Owns vault curation, device sync (Remarkable, Plaud), knowledge search, vault health audits, and ingestion workflows. Migrates Plaud from Chief, takes ownership of Remarkable skills.

files.description: New agent: Knox — Knowledge Manager, Vault Curator & Information Architect
New skill: Obsidian vault health audit — orphans, broken links, stale content, missing frontmatter
New skill: deep search across vault — all sources, cross-referenced, with connections
New skill: Plaud transcript ingestion — migrated from chief-plaud, re-owned by Knox
New workflow: unified ingestion pipeline — any capture surface → normalize → tag → link → file
New workflow: weekly knowledge digest — captures, orphans, floating actions, suggested connections
Added Knox routing signals to Agent Routing table
Transferred Plaud ownership to Knox; Chief now triggers Knox instead of running plaud directly
